name: stopMessageLiveLocation
description: Use this method to stop updating a live location message before live_period expires. On success, if the message is not an inline message, the edited Message

parameters.name: business_connection_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the business connection on behalf of which the message to be edited was sent

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target bot, supergroup or channel in the format @username.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Identifier of the message with live location to stop.

parameters.name: inline_message_id
parameters.description: Required if chat_id and message_id are not specified. Identifier of the inline message.

parameters.name: reply_markup
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized object for a new inline keyboard
